allow: Bash(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Select-Object -First 100 | Format-Table -Property FullName, Length, LastWriteTime -AutoSize)

Bash(Get-Service | Select-Object -First 100 | Format-Table -Property Name, DisplayName, Status -AutoSize)
Bash(Get-NetTCPConnection | Select-Object -First 100 | Format-Table -Property LocalAddress, LocalPort, RemoteAddress, RemotePort, State -AutoSize)
Bash(Get-EventLog -LogName * -EntryType * -Newest 100 | Format-Table -Property TimeGenerated, Source, EventID, Message -AutoSize)
